item.title: 수박 겉 핥기 (Korean proverbs illustrated reader).; 금성 청년 출판사. Subak kŏt halki (Korean proverbs illustrated reader). Chŏng, Hyŏng-sŏp, author.
item.description: Location: EAST-ASIAN BOOKSTACKS, Call Number: PN6519.K6 S83 1986, Publisher: Kŭmsŏng Ch'ŏngnyŏn Ch'ulp'ansa, P'yongyang :, 1986.0
